Name: Social Media Counter Desk Display
Short description: The Social Media Counter is a tiny, always-on desk display that shows your live followers and subscribers over Wi-Fi — big numbers, a next-milestone bar, and a daily-change ticker. Tracks YouTube, Twitch, GitHub and 10 more. No laptop, app, or phone.
Description:
The Social Media Counter puts your live follower and subscriber counts right on your desk. It is a tiny, always-on Wi-Fi display with big readable numbers, a next-milestone progress bar, and a daily-change ticker — so every bit of growth feels real. No laptop, no app, no phone.

What your Social Media Counter shows

  • YOUR NUMBER — followers, subscribers, stars, players, sales; whatever your platform tracks
  • NEXT MILESTONE — a progress bar to your next round number (1K, 10K, 100K...)
  • "+N today" — how much you have gained since it started watching
  • Refreshes automatically every minute over Wi-Fi
  • One-tap brightness and light/dark toggle

What you get

  • A pre-flashed Social Meter, ready to set up
  • A USB-C power cable
  • A 3D-printed desk stand
  • A printed setup card with a QR code to the step-by-step guide
  • Optional battery for cord-free placement

Setting up your Social Media Counter

Plug in — join the device's Wi-Fi from your phone — open the setup page — pick your platform and enter your handle (plus a free API key where needed) — enter your home Wi-Fi. Done, in about two minutes.

One device, every platform. One Social Media Counter, thirteen platforms: YouTube, Twitch, Spotify, Bluesky, Mastodon, GitHub, npm, Docker Hub, Discord, Steam, Shopify, Etsy and Reddit — just pick yours at setup, and switch any time.

The Social Media Counter is pre-flashed and ready — plug it in, pick your platform, and watch your numbers climb.

* Social Meter is an independent hardware project by Encinitas 3D. All platform names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners; this product is not made by, endorsed by, or affiliated with them.
